debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
mα : MeasurableSpace α
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
inst✝⁷ : DecidableEq α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty α
A : ℕ → Ω → α
R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁴ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝³ : IsMarkovKernel ν
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace Ω
inst✝¹ : Nonempty Ω
inst✝ : Countable α
h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount A R a (↑i) ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  -- `rewardByCount ... (n+1)` is distributed as `ω ↦ ω.2 (n+1) a` under `𝔓'`
  have h_id₁ :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount A R a (n + 1)) (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a) 𝔓'
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval h a (n + 1) (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  have h_id₂ :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (i : ℕ) ω)
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    -- both sides depend only on the second coordinate; use `IdentDistrib` with a measurable map
    have h_id_coord :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) id 𝔓' (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) where
      aemeasurable_fst := (measurable_snd : Measurable (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2)).aemeasurable
      aemeasurable_snd := Measurable.aemeasurable measurable_id
      map_eq := by
        simpa [Measure.snd, Measure.map_map, Bandit.streamMeasure] using (Measure.snd_prod P (Bandit.streamMeasure ν))
    have h_map :
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount A R a (i : ℕ) ω)
          = (fun f : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ f (i : ℕ) a) ∘ (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2) := by
      rfl
    have h_map' :
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a)
          = (fun f : (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ f (i : ℕ) a) ∘ id := by
      rfl
    refine (h_id_coord.comp ?_).trans ?_
    · fun_prop
    · simpa [h_map, h_map'] using IdentDistrib.refl (μ := Bandit.streamMeasure ν)
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a)
  -- independence on the stream measure, then transfer back by identDistrib
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    -- coordinates of the i.i.d. stream are independent
    simpa using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic_streamMeasure (ν := ν) (n := n) (a := a))
  -- lift to product measure and use identDistrib to conclude
  have h_indep_prod :
      IndepFun (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω : Ω × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓' := by
    simpa [𝔓', Measure.fst, Measure.snd] using
      (indepFun_snd_prod_iff.mp h_indep_stream)
  exact h_indep_prod.congr_identDistrib_left h_id₁.symm |>.congr_identDistrib_right h_id₂.symm
